caption: A screen recording shows a web browser window displaying a complex causal loop diagram on a black background. The diagram features green and red text connected by blue and red curved arrows, including labels such as "Attractiveness of Garden," "Birds at Bird feeder," "Buy Bird Seed," "Unsightly Goats," and "Present breakfast." A man with light skin, wearing a dark shirt and a grey baseball cap, appears in a small video inset in the upper right corner of the browser window. Across the sequence, the man remains largely stationary, though he appears to be speaking or reacting. The browser's address bar shows a URL starting with "https://deck.allure.io," and the window title reads "Trial E Learning by Discovery: Elements, by Systemdynamics." The diagram and the man's position remain consistent, with only minor movements in the video inset and the movement of a white mouse cursor across the black canvas.
